docker.notes: Validate image build contract and runtime configuration.

vercel.description: Frontend and fullstack deployment to Vercel.
vercel.notes: Confirm framework output mode and environment parity.

netlify.description: Static or hybrid deployment to Netlify.
netlify.notes: Validate build command and publish directory.

railway.notes: Validate service startup and post-deploy health.

fly-io.notes: Confirm region and machine rollout assumptions.

supabase.description: Database and edge deployment to Supabase.
supabase.notes: Prefer reversible migrations and explicit environment targeting.

aws.notes: Capture exact service and rollback route.

gcp.notes: Confirm project, region, and service target.

azure.notes: Validate target app and deployment slot strategy.

vps.description: Manual or semi-automated deployment to a VPS.
vps.notes: Require explicit service restart and rollback procedure.

cloudflare.notes: Validate target product and edge runtime assumptions.
